calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hee Kim for Marjorie Brown.

The Court stated that it got the waivers. Ms. Kim stated that she had nothing to add. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
